Jul 28, 2016
***TEXT ONLY NOTICE***NOTICE OF FILING AND PUBLICATION OF BRIEFING SCHEDULE re: pldg. ( 2 in MDL No. 2741), ( 1 in MDL No. 2741) BRIEFING SCHEDULE IS SET AS FOLLOWS: Notices of Appearance due on or before 8/11/2016. Corporate Disclosure Statements due on or before 8/11/2016. Responses due on or before 8/18/2016. Appearance forms (JPML form 18) and Corporate Disclosure forms can be downloaded from our website. Important: A Corporate Disclosure Form, if required, must be filed, even if one has previously been filed in this MDL.Please visit the CM/ECF Filing Guidelines & Forms page of our website for additional information.Signed by Clerk of the Panel Jeffery N. Luthi on 7/28/2016. Associated Cases: MDL No. 2741, CAC/2:16-cv-01609, CAC/2:16-cv-01988, CAC/2:16-cv-05035, CAC/5:16-cv-00726, CAE/1:16-cv-00406, CAN/3:16-cv-00525, CAN/3:16-cv-02341, CAS/3:15-cv-02279, FLS/9:16-cv-80539, HI/1:16-cv-00043, HI/1:16-cv-00075, ILN/1:16-cv-07588, ILS/3:16-cv-00812, ILS/3:16-cv-00823, ILS/3:16-cv-00825, KYW/5:16-cv-00112, LAE/2:16-cv-07491, MA/1:16-cv-11489, MSN/4:16-cv-00149, NE/4:16-cv-03074, WIW/3:16-cv-00518 (SM) (Entered: 07/28/2016)

summary: MDL 2741 consolidation order. 400+ federal Roundup/NHL cases centralized. Billions in projected exposure.
